# programs.obsidian

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.obsidian`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.obsidian.cli.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Obsidian CLI in obsidian.json . |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.app` | `null or (attribute set of anything)` | Settings to write to app.json . |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.appearance` | `null or (attribute set of anything)` | Settings to write to appearance.json . |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.communityPlugins` | `null or (list of ((submodule) or package convertible to it))` | |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.corePlugins` | `null or (list of ((submodule) or (one of “audio-recorder”, “backlink”, “bases”, “bookmarks”, “canvas”, “command-palette”, “daily-notes”, “editor-status”, “file-explorer”, “file-recovery”, “footnotes”, “global-search”, “graph”, “markdown-importer”, “note-composer”, “outgoing-link”, “outline”, “page-preview”, “properties”, “publish”, “random-note”, “slash-command”, “slides”, “switcher”, “sync”, “tag-pane”, “templates”, “webviewer”, “word-count”, “workspaces”, “zk-prefixer”) convertible to it))` | Core plugins to activate. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.cssSnippets` | `null or (list of ((submodule) or absolute path convertible to it))` | |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.extraFiles` | `null or (attribute set of (submodule))` | |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.hotkeys` | `null or (attribute set of list of (submodule))` | |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.themes` | `null or (list of ((submodule) or package convertible to it))` | |
| `programs.obsidian.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable obsidian. |
| `programs.obsidian.package` | `null or package` | The obsidian package to use. |
| `programs.obsidian.vaults` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | List of vaults to create. |
